text.title: Product-Led Growth (PM Angle) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying product-led growth (pm angle) end-to-end.

step.name: define-aha
step.action: Use sonnet to define aha_moment.event_sequence + max_minutes_from_signup.

step.name: instrument-aha
step.action: Add events to tracking plan; ship instrumentation.

step.name: set-cohort-metrics
step.action: Switch dashboards to activation-cohort conversion; deprecate signup-cohort number.

step.name: run-experiments
step.action: Run activation experiments <=2 concurrent per step; PM owns expansion lever.
